'''Clan Bralor''' was an ancient [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] clan that dates back since the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. The clan had with roots in the hill-[[Fortress/Legends|fort]] [[City/Legends|town]] of [[Norg Bral]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].

During the [[Mandalorian civil war (Third Galactic War)|Mandalorian Civil War]] as the [[Third Galactic War]] raged on, Clan Bralor would betray [[Mandalore the Avenger]] and side with the [[Hidden Chain]], [[Raid on Port Nowhere|attacking]] [[Port Nowhere]] with fellow defectors from Shae's cause.<ref name="TOR:RtN" />

==Notable members==
===Bralor===
[[File:Bralor1.jpg|thump|left|150px|Bralor]]
{{Main|Bralor}}
{{Quote|Only on the battlefield can you truly learn of someone.|Bralor|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
Bralor was respected Mandalorian warrior and was the champion of [[Battle Circle]] during the [[Dark Wars]]. Unlike many of his more aggressive Mandalorians, he respected the Jedi and had study much about them in hopes of understanding them in his quest to best them in combat. Even when being defeated by the Jedi Exile, [[Meetra Surik]], it gained his respect for her.

===Jogo===
[[File:Jogo.png|thump|left|150px|Jogo]]
{{Main|Jogo}}
{{Quote|This is camp for warriors, not hikers. You aren't welcome here.|Jogo|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
Jogo, also known as Jogo the Carver, was the son of [[Salus Bralor]]. He was hot headed and often called [[Torian Cadera]] 'arue'tal' translated as traitor's blood in [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]]. Jogo would however make the mistake of insulting the [[Hunter (individual)|Grand Hunt Champion]] and was killed by him.

===Salus Bralor===
[[File:Salus_Bralor.png|thump|left|150px|Salus]]
{{Main|Salus Bralor}}
{{Quote|Hmph. Like father, like son. Always picking the wrong side.|Salus Bralor|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic" />}}
Salus Bralor was the father of Jogo the Carver. Equally hotheaded as his son, Salus confronted the Grand Hunt Champion who killed his son. Only to share his fate in being killed.

===Cantis Bralor===
[[File:CantisBralor.jpg|thump|left|150px|Cantis Bralor]]
{{Main|Cantis Bralor}}
{{Quote|You are no match for the strength of Clan Bralor!|Cantis Bralor|<ref name="TOR:RtN" />}}
Cantis Bralor was the leader of the strike-force that [[Raid on Port Nowhere|assaulted]] [[Port Nowhere]] during the [[Mandalorian civil war (Third Galactic War)|Mandalorian civil war]] between [[Mandalorian Trat'ade|Mandalore the Avenger's faction]] and the [[Hidden Chain]].<ref name="TOR:RtN" />

===Rav Bralor===
[[File:Rav_Bralor.jpg|thump|left|150px|Rav Bralor]]
{{Main|Rav Bralor}}
{{Quote|If Zey thinks I'm trouble, he'll have a nasty shock if he gets Rav Bralor. You know what Mando females are like.|[[Kal Skirata]]|<ref name="TC" />}}
Rav Bralor was among the Mandalorian elite to be hired by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to train the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone army]], having been the one to train the Clone Commando Squads, [[Vevut Squad]] and [[Yayax Squad]]. After her duties as a trainer were over, she went back to [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] to help maintain the [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]]. She was present when [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]'s body was brought back and prepared the body for [[Cremation/Legends|cremation]].

===Neth Bralor===
{{Main|Neth Bralor}}
{{Quote|I'm with the Mand'alor on this. We lost nearly a million and a half people fighting the vongese. That might be small change for Coruscant, but it's a disaster for us. No more—not until we get Manda'yaim in order.|Neth Bralor|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
By time of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] the leadership of Clan Bralor would fall under Neth Bralor. During the meeting between the clan chieftains, mercenaries, and heads of Mandalorian corporations to discuss Mandalore's position in the war. Neth Bralor had agreed with the current [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mand'alor]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to stay neutral in the fighting in favor of rebuilding Mandalore from the attack by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their invasion on the galaxy.
